title: Pushable Amethysts
description: Allows budding amethysts to be pushed by pistons. Based on Carpet's 'movableAmethysts' rule.
body:
Allows Budding Amethyst blocks to be pushed by pistons. This is based off of Carpet Mod's 'movableAmethysts' feature, but without the Silk Touch capabilities. It's a fun/frustrating "move the blocks" puzzle!

Credit goes to gnembon & altrisi for the original code. Icon created with [Isometric Renders](https://modrinth.com/mod/isometric-renders).
